CodeBlockMethod.Name: MarkDismissed
CodeBlockMethod.Code: -- Called from the title's close button (client) while on map01, so this routes to server_main. -- senderUserId is the calling client's UserId (server-assigned). self.dismissedUsers[senderUserId] = true log("[TitleManager] MarkDismissed user=" .. tostring(senderUserId))

CodeBlockMethod.Name: OnUpdate
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
-- Client polls every frame: the title's Enable resets to its .ui default (true) whenever -- the client scene reloads on a room change, so we re-hide it whenever it should be hidden. local player = _UserService.LocalPlayer if not isvalid(player) then return end
local mapName = player.CurrentMapName if mapName == nil or mapName == "" then return end
local hide = false if mapName ~= self.startMapName then -- Any non-start map (e.g. instance room): the title never belongs here. hide = true else -- Back on the start map: hide only if this user already dismissed it earlier this session. local uid = player.PlayerComponent.UserId if uid ~= nil and self.dismissedUsers[uid] == true then hide = true end end
if hide then self:HideTitle() end

CodeBlockMethod.Name: HideTitle
CodeBlockMethod.Code: -- Disable the title UI group, but only when currently enabled (avoids redundant per-frame writes). local uiGroup = _EntityService:GetEntityByPath("/ui/DefaultGroup/UITitle") if isvalid(uiGroup) and uiGroup.Enable then uiGroup.Enable = false log("[TitleManager] title hidden (map check)") end
